mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nodes (user_id, name, os_type, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{osType}, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, os_type, status, last_seen, created_at FROM nodes WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE nodes SET status = 'Y', last_seen = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
